slots: Coronation site, queen’s chambers, Sahyadri views
Begin at Shivaji Maharaj’s capital — the 1674 coronation platform, granaries, and cliff walls explain why Raigad anchors Maharashtra’s newest UNESCO serial inscription.
Walk the full citadel ridge with a licensed guide. Clear weather reveals the Arabian Sea and the mountain fort network that defined Maratha strategy.
Konkan gateway town, local Malvani dinner
Descend to the Konkan foothills for seafood and rest before a second fort day.
